properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 61/20
ANDENES
NAVIGATIONAL WARNING. NAVIGATIONAL JAMMING GPS.
GPS JAMMING TEST MAY AFFECT GPS SIGNAL RECEPTION 
AND DISTURB USERS GPS RECEIVERS. 
 
TIME:
26.JUNE 2020. KL.10:25-KL.12:00 UTC
NOTIFICATION AREA 1.
27.JUNE 2020. KL.10:30-KL.12:00 UTC 
NOTIFICATION AREA 1.
28.JUNE 2020. KL.10:35-KL.12:00 UTC 
NOTIFICATION AREA 2.
 
NOTIFICATION AREA 1:
A. 69-27N 015-30E
B. 69-27N 016-15E
C. 69-18N 016-15E
D. 69-09N 015-30E
NOTIFICATION AREA AT SEA LEVEL-BELOW 100FTMSL.
 
NOTIFICATION AREA 2:
A. 69-36N 015-30E
B. 69-36N 016-30E
C. 69-18N 016-30E
D. 69-06N 015-30E
NOTIFICATION AREA AT SEA LEVEL-BELOW 100FTMSL.
 
NORWEGIAN DEFENCE RESEARCH ESTABLISHMENT-FFI, 
NORWEGIAN JOINT HEADQUARTERS (NJHQ) AND KONGSBERG 
SATELLITE SERVICES-KSAT WILL DURING THE ABOVE TIMES 
JAM GPS SIGNALS IN THE GPS L1-FREQUENCY BAND. USERS 
OF GPS MUST BE PREPARED TO HAVE LIMITED OR NO ACCESS 
TO GPS SIGNALS IN THE GIVEN PERIODS AND NOTIFICATION AREA.
 
CONTACT PHONE
OEYSTEIN BORLAUG:+47 901 14290
ABDIKERIM YUSUF:+47 912 56850
OERNULF KANDOLA: +47 918 12959
